name: Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp.
summary: PART I Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp. is a Nevada corporation with its principal executive offices at Two Pennsylvania Plaza, New York, NY, 10121. Unless the context otherwise requires, all references to we, us, our, MSG Entertainment or the Company refer collectively to Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp., a holding company, and its direct and indirect subsidiaries. We conduct substantially all of our business activities discussed in this Annual Report on Form10-K through MSG E...
